_comment: 3AX-UI Pterodactyl egg. Runtime binaries are baked into the Docker image, so the install script only prepares the server volume. Allocate the panel port (primary) plus one high port per inbound you plan to run.
name: 3AX-UI
author: iwebbio.dev@gmail.com
description: 3AX-UI proxy panel (Xray VLESS/VMess/Trojan/Shadowsocks/SOCKS/HTTP, MTProto, and userspace AmneziaWG/WireGuard) packaged for Pterodactyl. Runs fully unprivileged: no root, no TUN, no capabilities.

installation.script:
#!/bin/ash
# 3AX-UI Pterodactyl install script.
# Binaries are baked into the runtime image, so this only prepares the
# writable server volume (mounted at /mnt/server during installation).
set -e
mkdir -p /mnt/server/db /mnt/server/log /mnt/server/bin /mnt/server/cert
echo '3AX-UI: server volume prepared.'
echo 'Panel + Xray + MTProto binaries ship inside the Docker image.'
echo 'Remember to allocate one extra port per inbound you intend to run.'

variables.name: Panel port override
variables.description: Port the web panel listens on. Leave blank to use the server's primary allocation (recommended, so the panel is reachable at the server address). Only applied on first boot.

variables.name: Initial admin username
variables.description: Admin username to seed on first boot. Leave blank to keep the panel default (admin). Only applied on first boot; change it later in the panel.

variables.name: Initial admin password
variables.description: Admin password to seed on first boot. Leave blank to keep the panel default (admin) — change it immediately after logging in. Only applied on first boot.

variables.name: Cloudflare Tunnel: enable
variables.description: Expose the panel via a Cloudflare Tunnel (cloudflared) — a real HTTPS hostname with no inbound port. Set to true to enable. If you provide a token below, this is turned on automatically.

variables.name: Cloudflare Tunnel: token
variables.description: Connector token for a NAMED tunnel from the Cloudflare Zero Trust dashboard (Networks → Tunnels). Configure the hostname→service mapping there (service = http://127.0.0.1:<panel port>). Leave blank to use a quick trycloudflare.com URL instead.

variables.name: Cloudflare Tunnel: mode
variables.description: quick = ephemeral *.trycloudflare.com URL (no account, watch the console log for the URL). token = named tunnel using the token above. Leave blank to auto-detect from whether a token is set.
